# llms.txt
# AI Crawler and LLM Access Policy for NDN Analytics
# https://www.ndnanalytics.com/llms.txt
# Last Updated: 2026-04-14

# Overview
# NDN Analytics builds AI products and delivers enterprise AI services on Google Cloud Platform. 
# Our blockchain solutions on Ethereum bring transparency, security, and speed to enterprise operations.
# We specialize in AI-powered demand forecasting, supply chain traceability, smart contract automation, 
# and healthcare AI solutions.

# Contact Information
# Website: https://www.ndnanalytics.com
# Email: contact@ndnanalytics.com
# Location: Global enterprise services with focus on North America and Europe
# Social: LinkedIn (NDN Analytics)

# Primary Products & Services
# 
## AI Products (Google Cloud Platform)
# - NDN Demand IQ: AI-powered demand forecasting and inventory optimization for retail and supply chain
# - NDN HealthPredict: Healthcare AI for patient readmission prevention and clinical decision support
# - NDN RetailSync: Real-time inventory synchronization across multi-channel retail operations
# - NDN OpsAI: Enterprise operations automation using Google Cloud AI/ML services
#
## Blockchain Solutions (Ethereum)
# - NDN TraceChain: Supply chain traceability and provenance tracking on Ethereum
# - NDN PayStream: Automated B2B payment processing with smart contract escrow
# - NDN SupplyVerify: Pharmaceutical and healthcare supply chain compliance
# - NDN EscrowPro: Secure, trustless escrow for enterprise transactions
#
## AI & Blockchain Platforms
# - NDN Njangi: Decentralized savings and investment circles (tontines) for African markets
# - NDN NeuroQuest: AI-powered cognitive assessment and talent profiling platform
# - NDN Interpreter: Real-time sign language interpretation using computer vision AI
# - NDN FineTune: Custom AI model fine-tuning and deployment services

# Key Differentiators
# - 99.9% uptime SLA on all enterprise deployments
# - Expertise in both Google Cloud AI and Ethereum blockchain development
# - Proven track record: 45% stockout reduction, 100% FDA compliance, $4.2M+ annual savings for clients
# - 24/7 enterprise support with dedicated success teams
# - End-to-end implementation: from strategy to deployment to optimization

# Industries Served
# - Retail & E-commerce: Demand forecasting, inventory optimization
# - Healthcare: Patient outcomes, clinical AI, supply chain compliance
# - Supply Chain & Logistics: End-to-end traceability, payment automation
# - Financial Services: Smart contracts, DeFi solutions, escrow systems
# - Manufacturing: Quality control, predictive maintenance

# Technical Capabilities
# - Google Cloud Platform: Vertex AI, BigQuery, Cloud Functions, Firestore
# - Ethereum: Solidity smart contracts, ERC-20/ERC-721 tokens, DeFi protocols
# - AI/ML: TensorFlow, PyTorch, demand forecasting models, NLP, computer vision
# - Cloud Infrastructure: Serverless architecture, microservices, API-first design

# About: https://www.ndnanalytics.com/about

# Crawler Access Policy
User-agent: *
Allow: /
Allow: /products
Allow: /blog
Allow: /about
Allow: /solutions
Allow: /case-studies
Allow: /contact
Allow: /pricing
Allow: /ai-tools

# Sitemap
Sitemap: https://www.ndnanalytics.com/sitemap.xml
